What We OfferየምናቀርበውKan Kennu Keenya

Our Licensesየምንሰጣቸው ፈቃዶችHayyama Kennu Keenya

Every license. Every level.ለሁሉም ምድቦች።Gulantaa hayyama hunda.

🚕
Taxi License (S)የታክሲ ፈቃድ (ኤስ)Hayyama Taaksii (S)
Public Service Licenseየህዝብ አገልግሎት ፈቃድHayyama Tajaajila Ummataa
Public transport professional.ሙያዊ የህዝብ ትራንስፖርት ፈቃድ።Hayyama geejjiba ummataa Itoophiyaa.
🚛
Freight License 1 / 2 / 3የጭነት ፈቃድ 1 / 2 / 3Hayyama Fe'aa 1 / 2 / 3
All Levels Availableሁሉም ደረጃዎችGulantaa Hunda
Light, medium & heavy cargo — all three levels.ሦስት ደረጃ — ቀላል፣ መካከለኛ፣ ከባድ።Sadarkaa sadii — haphii, giddu-galeessa, cimaa.
🛢️
Liquid Truck License 1 / 2የፈሳሽ ጭነት ፈቃድ 1 / 2Hayyama Tirakkii Dhangala'aa 1 / 2
Specialized Level 2ልዩ ደረጃ 2Addaatti Gulantaa 2
Tanker & liquid cargo specialist training.ፈሳሽ ጭነት እና ታንከር ልዩ ሥልጠና።Leenjii addaa taankarii fi fe'aa dhangala'aa.
🚗
Beginner License (Class A)የጀማሪ ፈቃድ (ምድብ አ)Hayyama Jalqabduu (Klaasii A)
Private Vehicle — 3,500 ETBየግል ተሽከርካሪ — 3,500 ብርKonkolaataa Dhuunfaa — 3,500 ETB
Traffic laws, road signs & practical driving skills.ትራፊክ ሕጎች፣ ምልክቶች እና ተግባራዊ ክህሎቶች።Seera tiraafikaa, mallattoo fi ogummaa hojii.
✓ Government Certified
EST. 2010
About Usስለ እኛWaa'ee Keenya

Ethiopia's Trusted Driving Schoolየኢትዮጵያ የሚታመን የሹፌር ት/ቤትMana Barumsaa Konkolaataa Amanamaa Itoophiyaa

Founded in 2010, Bekam has trained 5,000+ students across Ethiopia with a 98% exam pass rate.ከ2010 ጀምሮ 5,000+ ተማሪዎችን አሰልጥነናል።Bara 2010 irraa jalqabee barattoota 5,000+ leenjisneerra.

5,000+
GraduatesምሩቃንEegumsa
98%
Pass Rateማለፍ ደረጃSadarkaa Darbuu
15+
Years ActiveዓመታትWaggaa
🏅
Government Licensed & Certifiedመንግስታዊ ፈቃድ ያለውHayyama Mootummaa Qabu
Accredited — Ethiopian Transport Authority.በኢትዮጵያ ትራንስፖርት ባለስልጣን የተረጋገጠ።Abbaa Taayitaa Geejjibaa Itoophiyaatiin beekame.
🚗
Modern Fleet of Vehiclesዘመናዊ ተሽከርካሪዎችKonkolaataa Ammayyaa
All vehicle types for every license class.ለሁሉም ፈቃድ ምድቦች ዘመናዊ ተሽከርካሪ።Konkolaataa gulantaa hayyama hunda.
📋
98% First-Time Pass Rate98% የመጀመሪያ ጊዜ ማለፍSadarkaa Darbuu 98%
Best-in-class exam success rate.ከፍተኛ የፈቃድ ፈተና ማለፍ ደረጃ።Sadarkaa darbiinsa qormaataa ol'aanaa.
Our FacilityተቋማችንDhaabbata Keenya

Inside Bekam Driving Schoolውስጥ ቤካም ሹፌር ት/ቤትKeessa Mana Barumsaa Bekam

Our PeopleሰዎቻችንNamoota Keenya

Our TeamቡድናችንGaree Keenya

From enrollment to exam — we guide every step.ከምዝገባ እስከ ፈቃድ ፈተና።Galmeessaa irraa qormaataatti.

Naol B.
Managerሥራ አስኪያጅMeneejara
"Exceptional leadership. The school runs flawlessly under his direction."«ታላቅ አመራር። ት/ቤቱ ጥሩ ሥርዓት አለው።»«Geggeessummaa ol'aanaa. Manni barumsaa qindaa'aadha.»
Emabet
RepresentativeወኪልBakka Bu'aa
"Professional and warm — made enrollment effortless."«ሙያዊ እና ደጋ — ምዝገባን ቀላል አደረገችው።»«Ogummaa fi gaariittuu. Galmeessa salphaa goote.»
Eskdar
SecretaryፀሐፊBarreessaa
"Fast, accurate, always helpful."«ፈጣን፣ ትክክለኛ፣ ሁልጊዜ ዝግጁ ነን!»«Saffisaa, sirrii, yeroo hundaa qophii.»
👨‍🏫
Zewudu
Classroom Teacherየክፍል አስተማሪBarsiisaa Kutaa
"Makes traffic law simple and memorable."«ትራፊክ ሕጎችን ቀላልና ሚዛናዊ ያብራራል።»«Seerota tiraafikaa salphaa fi ifa godha.»
Tesfu
Driving Instructorየሹፌርነት አስተማሪBarsiisaa Konkolaachuu
"Patient and skilled — I passed on my first try."«ትዕግሥተኛ። በመጀመሪያ ሙከራ ፈቃዴን አወጣሁ።»«Obsa guddaa — yeroo jalqabatti qormaata darbe.»
👨‍🏫
Dereje
Driving Instructorየሹፌርነት አስተማሪBarsiisaa Konkolaachuu
"Safety-first approach. Every session builds real confidence."«ደህንነት ቀዳሚ። እያንዳንዱ ክፍለ ጊዜ ሙያ ይገነባል።»«Nageenyaaf dursa — kaayyoo hunda mirkaneessa.»
LeadershipአመራርHogganummaa
CEO & Founder

Mr. Amsalu Asfaw

CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER  ·  FOUNDER
"Building Ethiopia's safest drivers — one student at a time."«ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ ሹፌሮችን አንድ ተማሪ በአንዴ እንሠራለን።»«Konkolaachiftuu nagaa Itoophiyaa — barataa tokko tokkootti.»

Founder of Bekam Driving School, Mr. Amsalu has built one of Bishoftu's most trusted institutions — known for discipline, quality, and results.አቶ አምሳሉ አስፋው የቢሾፍቱ ዋና ሹፌር ት/ቤቶች አንዷን ሠርተዋል።Obbo Amsalu Bekam — mana barumsaa amanamaa Bishoftu hundeesse.
